text: The v38 schema migration is implemented in `apps/dashboard/pkg/migration/schemaversion/v38.go` (not under `pkg/services/dashboardimport/` or `pkg/services/dashboards/` as the task suggested — those directories handle the import service layer but delegate migration to the `apps/dashboard/pkg/migration/` package). The entry point is function `V38` (line 75) which calls `processPanelsV38` (line 90). The flawed conditional logic is the nested type-assertion guard at lines 116-117: `if defaults, ok := fieldConfig["defaults"].(map[string]interface{}); ok { if custom, ok := defaults["custom"].(map[string]interface{}); ok {`. When `defaults.custom` is absent, this nested conditional fails and the entire defaults `displayMode`→`cellOptions` migration is skipped. While `migrateOverrides(fieldConfig)` at line 131 is called outside the conditional (processing override `custom.displayMode`→`custom.cellOptions`), the migration does NOT create a base `defaults.custom.cellOptions` structure for panels missing `defaults.custom`. This causes override-only field configurations (column widths, text alignment) to be silently dropped because the frontend's override merging depends on a base `cellOptions` in defaults. The schema version constant file registering v38 is `apps/dashboard/pkg/migration/schemaversion/migrations.go` at line 74 (`38: V38`) within the `GetMigrations` function (line 36). The migration pipeline is orchestrated by `Migrate()` in `apps/dashboard/pkg/migration/migrate.go` (line 51).
